findings.active_tier1_event: Nasdaq Bitcoin options approval pending (bullish catalyst) vs. altcoin rotation away from major ETFs (bearish flow signal)
findings.sentiment_summary: Market sentiment is mixed but leaning bearish due to recent ETF outflows and investor rotation into altcoins, despite bullish catalysts from geopolitical de-escalation and new institutional infrastructure. Fear/greed index remains in fear territory (25-30 range) indicating underlying caution despite headline optimism.

breaking_news.event: HYPE/XRP funds attract millions as BTC/ETH ETFs see outflows (Tier-1)
breaking_news.impact: Capital rotation from major asset ETFs to altcoin speculation

breaking_news.event: BTC spot ETF $2.26B outflows in 2 weeks (Tier-1)
Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh sworn in (Tier-1)
breaking_news.impact: Central bank leadership transition coinciding with BTC weakness

findings.top_sentiment_signal: Conflicted market: bullish infrastructure developments (Nasdaq options) and geopolitical relief (Iran peace) are being overwhelmed by bearish capital flows—investors dumping $2.26B+ from BTC/ETH ETFs into altcoin speculation (HYPE/XRP)—suggesting retail-driven euphoria masked by institutional caution. Fear/greed index at 25-30 (Fear/Extreme Fear) confirms underlying pessimism despite positive headlines.
